title: Acne
license_notes: Use as public patient-education source support. Avoid verbatim copying into primitives.
supports: Acne is a common skin condition with pimples from clogged hair follicles.
Acne often affects the face, neck, chest, back, and shoulders.
Severe nodules, cysts, scarring, medication-sensitive plans, infection, or pregnancy-related treatment decisions need clinician follow-up.
